---
title: "My Hometown"
---

# Wuxi

[ Wuxi is a city in Jiangsu Province, known for its beautiful scenery and rich culture. ]{style="font-size:20px;"}

![](images/wuxi_lake.jpg){width="80%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🌿 Taihu Lake

::::: {.columns align="center"}
::: {.column width="58%"}
![](images/taihu.jpg){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.column width="42%"}
[ Taihu Lake is one of the largest freshwater lakes in China and a symbol of Wuxi. ]{style="font-size:20px;"}
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🏯 Lingshan Buddha

::::: {.columns align="center"}
::: {.column width="58%"}
![](images/lingshan.jpg){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.column width="42%"}
[ The Lingshan Grand Buddha is one of the tallest Buddha statues in the world. ]{style="font-size:20px;"}
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🍜 Local Food

::::: {.columns align="center"}
::: {.column width="58%"}
![](images/wuxi_food.jpg){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.column width="42%"}
[ Wuxi cuisine is famous for its slightly sweet taste. Popular dishes include spare ribs and soup dumplings. ]{style="font-size:20px;"}
:::
:::::
